ddls:
CREATE TABLE "power_plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power plant */,
  "lookup_code" TEXT /* Lookup code for the power plant */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code where the power plant is located */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Group name of the power plant (e.g., PWRBIO001) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the power plant */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the power plant in megawatts */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the power plant was built */,
  "pp_life_time" INTEGER /* Operational lifetime of the power plant in years */,
  "energy_source" TEXT /* Energy source (e.g., biomass, coal, hydro) */,
  "technology_type" TEXT /* Technology type (e.g., thermal, renewable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the power plant (e.g., operational, decommissioned) */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the power plant */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the power plant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the power plant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the power plant is located */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province where the power plant is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the power plant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_plants_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_plants_lookup_code FOREIGN KEY ("lookup_code") REFERENCES lookup_codes ("lookup_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_plants_group_name FOREIGN KEY ("group_name") REFERENCES groups ("group_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "lookup_codes" (
  "lookup_code" TEXT /* Lookup code for the power plant */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the power plant corresponding to the lookup code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lookup code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lookup_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., PWRBIO001) */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the group (e.g., renewable, non-renewable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the power plant being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES power_plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "energy_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source (e.g., biomass, coal, hydro) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technologies" (
  "technology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology */,
  "technology_name" TEXT /* Name of the technology (e.g., thermal, renewable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., operational, decommissioned) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_plant_energy_sources" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the power plant */,
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source used by the power plant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id", "energy_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_plant_technologies" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the power plant */,
  "technology_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technology used by the power plant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id", "technology_id")
)
